$comment: v2.0.0-rc1 structural-tampered conformance fixture (mixed-environment-keys) -- Phase 7.F.4 sub-arc C session 100. bundle.zip generated by packages/example-bundle/scripts/conformance-fixtures/v2-bundle-structural-tampered-generator.ts from valid-v2-bundle baseline + targeted structural mutation. See tamper.json for mutation details + expected_failures per check. output_format_version=2 per spec section 14.1 line 1632 + section 18.10 v2-bundle requirement. checks[0].algorithm_verdicts (cardinality 2 per spec section 18.10) populated per failure topology -- both fail on schema-cross-check short-circuit (failV2 helper), per-leg fail/pass when one leg runs + fails + the other passes.

errors: check 1 (manifest signature): manifest.json: signing.signatures[0].key_id "issuer-prod-v2-ed25519" does not match pinned "issuer-dev-v2-ed25519"; spec §18.7 requires signing.signatures[i].key_id equals the pinned issuer key's KeyID

warnings: check 5 (OpenTimestamps Bitcoin anchor): manifest.anchors.opentimestamps: OTS submission declared pending Bitcoin confirmation with receipt_path=null (no on-disk receipt yet); --allow-pending-ots opt-in folds to pass — anchor pipeline run deferred to post-submission window; spec §10 requires pending OTS state with null receipt_path is the pre-receipt submission-deferred lifecycle state; receipt is written when the calendar response is captured

check 7 (GitHub anchor cross-check): github_anchors/2026-04-22.json: mirror_status="anchor-pending" for daily root date "2026-04-22" — V1 deploy-bootstrap state (--allow-anchor-pending opt-in: anchor commit deferred to Phase 5; operator MUST verify check 5 (OTS Bitcoin) + check 6 (RFC 3161) verdicts to confirm independent witnesses are present); spec §12 requires V1 anchor-pending state is operator-acknowledged degradation; full anchor verification awaits post-Phase-5 anchored commits

checks.skip_reason: bundle uses single-key signing topology; ephemeral-session attestation not applicable
bundle_type="example-demo" is not audit-log-export; dual-subtree composition not applicable
